synthesis.summary: NVDA dropped 6.16% on elevated volume despite positive news of South Korean partnership deals. The SK Hynix, SK Telecom, and Naver agreements are growth-oriented announcements that don't explain a sharp selloff of this magnitude — the decline more likely reflects broader macro pressure, sector rotation, or options/institutional flow not captured in the supplied news.

SKM (SK Telecom) dropped nearly 9% despite news of an AI partnership deal with Nvidia, suggesting the move is driven by factors not captured in the supplied news — likely the ongoing impact of SK Telecom's large-scale SIM card hacking scandal and customer churn concerns that have been weighing on the stock. The Nvidia deal news is positive but insufficient to explain a sharp single-day decline of this magnitude.
